title: Python Print and Input
description: Practice a small Python script that reads a name and prints a greeting.
learningGoals: Use input() to read a string.
Use an f-string to format output.

completionChecks.explanation: input() returns a string. Convert it explicitly when a number is needed.

completionChecks.prompt: What does the f prefix do in f"Hello {name}"?
completionChecks.explanation: An f-string evaluates expressions inside braces and inserts their string representation.

targetCode:
# Learn: Read text and print a formatted greeting.
name = input("Name: ")  # input returns str.
message = f"Hello, {name}!"
print(message)
